name: Proving Head Injury Hearing Loss in Utah

mainEntity.name: What proof is needed for 'direct head injury' hearing loss claims in Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: What proof is needed for 'direct head injury' hearing loss claims in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical evidence linking acoustic trauma or skull fracture to immediate hearing drop, plus incident reports, distinguishing from gradual NIHL under Utah Code 34A-2-503.

suggestedAnswer.text: Head injuries get priority dating from event. Bountiful warehouse cases need ER records, CT scans proving causation. Differs from noise claims requiring exposure tests. Insurers conflate; experts clarify for full benefits including tinnitus.[4]

description: Medical evidence linking acoustic trauma or skull fracture to immediate hearing drop, plus incident reports, distinguishing from gradual NIHL under Utah Code 34
